The Family
A quiet heart's words
From Your Son
Venkata Sreedhar Subba Rao
Dear Nanna & Amma,
Words don't come easily to me — but what I feel for you runs deeper than anything I could ever say aloud. You gave me roots when I needed grounding, and wings even when I wasn't ready to fly. Every silent lesson you lived by became the foundation I stand on today. The life I have built — my career, my home, my sense of purpose — traces back to your steady love and quiet sacrifice. From the first breath to every dream I chased — you provided everything, asked for nothing. No measure of success I reach will ever equal what you gave freely, simply out of love. 🙏
Pavani joins me in wishing you a lifetime
filled with health, peace, and all the happiness
you so richly deserve.
We love you deeply — today and always. 💛🌸
✦   Happy Retirement   ✦
And little Vamika Sita Kumari is waiting
to fill your days with more joy
than you could ever imagine. 💕
— Your Son, Venkata Sreedhar Subba Rao
with love & gratitude · from the US, always home
